It all starts with the company's own numbers.
Lucra kopplas till Fortnox och läser bol: Lucra connects to Fortnox and reads the company's actual finances — transactions, VAT, results and payroll. Always up to date, never guessed.
Lucra understands what the numbers mean.
Ovanpå datan bygger Lucra en levande bil: On top of the data, Lucra builds a living picture of how the company is doing — and answers everyday finance questions in plain language, instantly and around the clock.
The firm steps in when needed.
Komplexa frågor eskaleras till redovisni: Complex questions are escalated to the accountant with full context preserved. People handle the qualified work — Lucra handles the everyday.
Kvalificerad rådgivning när frågan kräve: Qualified advisory when the question needs a human.
Svarar på vardagsfrågor på enkel svenska: Answers everyday questions in plain language, around the clock.
En levande bild av hur bolaget faktiskt: A living picture of how the company is really doing.
Transaktioner, moms, resultat och lön —: Transactions, VAT, results and payroll — synced in real time.
Lucra ansluter till systemen där dina da: Lucra connects to the systems where your data already lives. Fortnox is our first deep integration — and via Skatteverket we keep track of taxes and filing.
Verifikat, kontoplan, kunder och leveran: Vouchers, chart of accounts, customers and suppliers are fetched automatically. Syncing runs in the background so the dashboard always mirrors the bookkeeping.
Bygger man fintech bygger man också säke: If you build fintech, you build security from the first line of code. Lucra follows Swedish and European regulations and keeps your records within the EU.
Personuppgifter behandlas enligt GDPR. T: Personal data is processed under GDPR. Clear roles, consent and data disclosure on request.
Kryptering i vila och i transit: Encryption at rest and in transit
All data krypteras med moderna standarde: All data is encrypted with modern standards, both when stored and when moved between systems.
All kunddata lagras hos europeiska lever: All customer data is stored with European providers. No transfers to third countries without a legal basis.
Tilldela åtkomst per bolag och roll. Byr: Assign access per company and role. Firms and clients see only what they should.
